name: dryui
description: DryUI component library — conventions, lookup, validation, and composition guidance for Svelte 5

interface.shortDescription: Svelte 5 component guidance and live lookup tools
interface.longDescription: Bundles DryUI's Svelte component guidance, project bootstrap workflow, live feedback skill, and MCP server so Codex can build and review Svelte workspaces without guessing component shape.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap DryUI in a new or existing SvelteKit app.
Implement a DryUI settings page without guessing APIs.
Review this Svelte file for DryUI composition mistakes.
